name: io.github.bulatko/vk
description: Model Context Protocol server for VK (VKontakte) social network API. Access users, walls, groups, friends, newsfeed, photos, and community stats.

environmentVariables.description: VK API access token. Get it at https://oauth.vk.com/authorize?client_id=6121396&scope=wall,friends,groups,photos,stats,offline&response_type=token
environmentVariables.name: VK_ACCESS_TOKEN
